changeSet.author: root
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE service ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), name varchar(255) NOT NULL )

changeSet.author: root
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE client ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), telegram_id BIGINT NOT NULL UNIQUE, phone_number VARCHAR(255), name VARCHAR(255),
CONSTRAINT uk_client_telegram_id UNIQUE (telegram_id) )

changeSet.author: root
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE car ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), make VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, model VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, year INTEGER NOT NULL, vin VARCHAR(17) UNIQUE, client_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES client(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() )

changeSet.author: root
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE station ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), address VARCHAR(255), contact VARCHAR(255) )
